overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic waterfront promenade at dusk. The scene features neon-lit billboards, palm trees, modern architecture, and a mix of natural and artificial lighting as the player moves from a covered walkway to an open waterfront and back under building cover.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway with colorful illuminated ceiling panels. Large digital billboards advertise on the right side as the player walks forward. The environment transitions from sheltered to open as the player approaches the waterfront, with palm trees becoming visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Now in the open waterfront area, the player walks along a paved promenade with the ocean on the left. Palm trees line the walkway and a massive futuristic skyscraper rises in the distance. The lighting shifts to natural dusk as the covered roof recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway with traffic and street lighting

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the waterfront promenade as the sky darkens. Modern street lamps illuminate the path while vehicles pass on the adjacent road. The futuristic skyscraper grows larger in the center of the frame as the player approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with stairs and illuminated overhang

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs toward a building entrance with orange neon lighting

wide concrete steps leading up to entrance

segments.scene_description: Approaching a large building entrance, the player ascends concrete stairs while moving under an overhang with distinctive orange neon lighting. The waterfront railing falls behind as the player gains elevation and moves into a more sheltered urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under building with digital advertising

segments.scene_description: Walking under the building's orange-lit overhang, the player passes yellow-framed digital billboards displaying advertisements. The environment is now fully sheltered with artificial lighting dominating the scene, while the waterfront remains visible in the distance to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, neon-lit corridor out onto an expansive futuristic waterfront at dusk. It begins under a covered walkway characterized by colorful illuminated ceiling panels and large digital billboards, moving forward as the shelter gradually gives way to the open air. As the camera emerges from the roof, the scene expands into a paved promenade lined with palm trees and the ocean to the left, while the lighting shifts from artificial glow to the natural hues of twilight. The path then continues along the waterfront under the light of modern street lamps and passing vehicles, before finally centering on a massive futuristic skyscraper that looms larger in the frame as the sky darkens.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open waterfront promenade into the sheltered, neon-lit entrance of a futuristic building. It begins with the camera ascending concrete stairs, leaving the waterfront railing behind as it gains elevation. As the player moves further upward, the scene shifts from the open air to the cover of a large building overhang bathed in distinctive orange neon lighting. The environment then becomes fully enclosed by artificial light as the camera passes yellow-framed digital billboards, while the distant waterfront remains visible to the left.
